title: quercus thorelii
intro: Quercus thorelii is a species of evergreen tree within the Fagaceae family, native to Vietnam and China. The bark and leaves of this tree are used in traditional medicine, possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus thorelii include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can also be dried or processed into capsules and tablets for easier consumption.
